pages.text: $(l)Spell Base Progression$()$(br2)Spell bases multiply your wand's power and reduce cooldown. Three tiers — each requires the previous + more aether.
$(l)Tier 1$(): +20% power, -10% cooldown.$(br)Vanilla materials only — early game accessible.
$(l)Tier 2$(): +50% power, -20% cooldown.$(br)4 aether shards form the lattice that holds the higher tier.
$(l)Tier 3$(): +100% power, -40% cooldown.$(br)Requires a $(l)Block of Aether$() per craft, plus nether stars and refined crystals. End-game tier.
$(l)Upgrade Stone$() — applies a permanent power boost to an equipped spell scroll. Highest tier crafting requirement. Save them for your favorite spell.
